summary_en: Seibu Real Estate completed a tender offer to acquire 6,174,876 common shares and warrants of E-Grand Co., Ltd. (TSE Standard: 3294), which ended on May 18, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Results of Tender Offer for Shares and Warrants of E-Grand Co., Ltd. (Security Code: 3294)
translation_en_brief: On March 31, 2026, the board of Seibu Real Estate (a consolidated subsidiary of Seibu Holdings Inc., listed on TSE Prime: 9024) resolved to acquire shares and warrants of E-Grand Co., Ltd. (TSE Standard: 3294) through a tender offer under the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act. The tender offer commenced on April 1, 2026, and concluded on May 18, 2026. The offer targeted 6,174,876 common shares with a floor of 4,105,200 shares, along with three series of warrants (5th, 6th, and 7th Series, issued 2014–2016). This announcement notifies shareholders of Seibu Holdings that the tender offer has completed. Detailed results are provided in the attached notice issued by Seibu Real Estate on May 19, 2026.
